channel.title: RACI on RaihnForge
channel.description: Recent content in RACI on RaihnForge

item.title: COVID Uplift: Team PM Plan, Progress, Staff, Quality, Risk
item.description:
Editor’s note: classmate names in the original document have been replaced with Teammate 1, Teammate 2, and Teammate 3 in keeping with this archive’s privacy conventions.

This is the Lab 3 mid-flight artifact for the ADMG 374 team project. Teammate 2 rotated into the Project Manager role for this lab; I co-authored across the four planning sections and was the assigned risk owner for the highest-impact item on the qualitative matrix. The artifact bundles the triple-constraint progress report, the staffing management plan with RACI, the quality management plan, and the risk management plan into a single Lab 3 submission.
